home.title: Building low-level solutions for high-level problems

footer.tagline: Building low-level solutions for high-level problems.

mokeos.short_desc: A custom monolithic kernel and operating system built from the ground up, focusing on high-performance memory management and a minimalist skeuomorphic interface.
mokeos.description: mokeOS is an ambitious systems engineering project dedicated to exploring the fundamentals of low-level computing. Developed as a custom monolithic kernel, it features a proprietary file system (MFS), advanced encrypted messaging protocols, and a dedicated system architecture designed for x86 platforms. Beyond the kernel, mokeOS bridges the gap between hardware and user experience by implementing a unique visual language. Inspired by early Apple design principles, the OS utilizes a 'Liquid Glass' UI engine, proving that high-performance system code can coexist with sophisticated, fluid aesthetics.

lemonrepo.short_desc:
LemonRepo is a curated library of high-quality iOS apps and games, focused on performance, stability, and real-world usability.

No clutter. No junk. Just the essentials.

moketube.short_desc: MokeTube is a native tvOS application designed to provide a seamless, ad-free viewing experience by leveraging decentralized Invidious instances. Built with SwiftUI and Combine, the project demonstrates advanced architectural patterns for handling asynchronous media streaming and polymorphic data parsing.

mokeinfotainment.short_desc: MokeCar (or Moke Infotainment) is a mock infotainment system based on web technologies with the goal of researching and testing out how they work.

newton.short_desc: Newton is an AI assistant created by Daniel Limón. Unlike most models, Newton is trained to prioritize honesty over usefulness — he will explicitly say "I don't know" rather than invent an answer. Newton can also operate autonomously: given a goal, he can plan, execute code in a sandboxed environment, detect bugs with his "Microscope" tool, and iterate until success or graceful failure.

glaze.short_desc: Glaze is a social media platform focused on posts, photos and videos. With its included photo editor, it makes Glaze good for instant photos.
